reasoning: Without access to live search or a working Polymarket URL, I must rely on base rates and structural incentives. OpenAI typically defines AGI as a highly autonomous system outperforming humans at most economically valuable work. Sam Altman and other leaders have historically placed AGI timelines closer to the end of the decade (2029-2030) rather than 2025. Furthermore, there is a massive legal and financial disincentive to formally declare AGI: OpenAI's partnership with Microsoft stipulates that Microsoft's license to OpenAI technology does not apply to AGI. Explicitly announcing 'We have achieved AGI' would trigger complex legal consequences regarding IP and commercial rights. Given these factors, a formal, official announcement by OpenAI that they have created AGI by December 2025 is extremely unlikely. The probability is estimated at the floor of acceptable bounds.
